input.command: python3 << 'EOF' import json, re, time, urllib.request from pathlib import Path BASE = "https://cityofheroes.dev" HEADERS = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7)"} JSON_OUT = Path("/Users/steven/CoX-mod-Adventure/mods.json") def fetch(url): req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=HEADERS) with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as r: return r.read().decode("utf-8", errors="replace") # Scrape all listing pages for id→category mapping id_to_cat = {} for page in range(1, 18): url = f"{BASE}/mods/index.php?search=&category=&author=¤tpage={page}" html = fetch(url) # Find pairs: ... CATEGORY cards = re.findall(r']*>([^<]+)', html, re.DOTALL) for mid, cat in cards: id_to_cat[int(mid)] = cat.strip() print(f" page {page}: {len(cards)} categories found") time.sleep(0.3) print(f"\nTotal id→category mappings: {len(id_to_cat)}") # Update mods.json mods = json.loads(JSON_OUT.read_text()) updated = 0 for m in mods: cat = id_to_cat.get(m["id"]) if cat and cat != m.get("category"): m["category"] = cat updated += 1 mods.sort(key=lambda m: m["downloads"], reverse=True) JSON_OUT.write_text(json.dumps(mods, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)) cats = {} for m in mods: cats[m["category"]] = cats.get(m["category"], 0) + 1 print(f"Updated {updated} category fields") print("Category breakdown:") for k, v in sorted(cats.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]): print(f" {k}: {v}") EOF
